headline: New US$2.7 Billion Hypersonic Weapons Contract Might Change The Case For Investing In Leidos Holdings (LDOS)
summary: Earlier in May 2026, America's warfighters announced they will receive an initial 3,000 Leidos Low-Cost Containerized Munitions under a Department of War framework agreement, alongside a US$2.70 billion U.S. Army contract for Leidos to advance hypersonic weapons from prototyping to production. Together, these awards highlight Leidos’ expanding role in U.S. precision strike and hypersonic programs, underpinned by company-funded missile development and planned manufacturing expansion in...
